summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of IXLPro SaaS website updates. Most features working correctly including typewriter animation, counter formats, live incrementing, and diverse profile pictures. One critical issue found with settings panel interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Gear icons not opening settings dropdown panels when clicked
ui_bugs.details: Settings buttons are present but clicking them doesn't trigger the AnimatePresence panels to open. Event handlers may not be properly attached or event propagation is being blocked.

passed_tests: Hero headline typewriter animation changes text every ~4 seconds
Questions Answered counter shows correct 'XXM+' format (single +, not ++)
Live counter in parentheses increments by 7-13 every 2 seconds
Interactive menu is visible and responds to hover
Menu starts with initial left tilt (rotateY=-12)
Reviews section has diverse profile pictures (15 different Unsplash avatars)
Reviews page has diverse profile pictures and sorting functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix settings panel interaction in InteractiveMenu.jsx - gear icons should open AnimatePresence dropdown panels with form controls (dropdowns, range inputs, text inputs) but currently not responding to clicks. Check event handlers and ensure toggleSettings function is properly bound.
